name: Shuna
description: Shuna 「朱菜シュナ, shuna, lit. "Vermilion Vegetable"」 is a Majin in service to Rimuru Tempest after being named by them. She is Benimaru's younger sister and is Rimuru's chief economic advisor together with Rigurd. She resides in Rimuru City of the Jura-Tempest Federation.
creator: Heeheeho
